sets.name: Trip, Route, Luggage & Useful Action Words

words.exam_use_en: Action keyword. It appears in questions asking what the driver should do: toimia, hoitaa, varmistaa, tiedustella, tarjota or ottaa huomioon.
Assistance keyword. Link with erityisryhmä, liikuntarajoitteinen, avustaja, hoitolaitos and asking what help the customer needs.
Wheelchair and mobility-device keyword. Link with avustaminen, nostin, kiinnitys, turvalaite, and turvallinen kuljetus. The exam logic is safe assistance, not speed.
Visually impaired passenger keyword. Link with sokea, opaskoira, kysyä tarvitseeko apua, ajoneuvon suunta, and clear guidance. Do not assume; ask and guide safely.
Accessibility keyword. Link with esteetön kuljetus and este. Used in accessible taxi service and special passenger needs.
Lift keyword. Link with henkilönostin, pyörätuoli and safe boarding/unloading of mobility-impaired passengers.
Use this word in Pyörätuoli / esteetön / special assistance questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Näkövammainen / opaskoira questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Refusal keyword. Link with kieltäytyä, kieltää, ei suostu and halua. Often used when a customer refuses safety requirements or the driver may refuse unsafe service.
Securing/fastening keyword. Link with kiinnittää, valjaat, paarit, selinmakuu and pyörätuolin kiinnitys. Correct securing is a major safety clue.
Use this word in Puhelin / viestimet questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Communication / kielitaito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Hearing-impaired passenger keyword. Link with kuuro, kuulovammainen, huuli, kommunikointi, and writing/clear communication if speech is not enough.
Use this word in Communication / kielitaito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use poispäin/poistua in movement or exit situations, especially when a passenger or wheelchair must move safely away from the vehicle or danger.
Child-passenger keyword. Link with yksin matkustava lapsi, alle 15-vuotias, huoltaja, turvavyö, and safely reaching sisätila/perille. The driver has stronger care responsibility.
Seat-belt safety keyword. Link with lapsi, alle 15-vuotias, kiinnittää turvavyö, suostua/ei suostu. The safe answer often requires stopping first and continuing only when turvavyö is kiinni.
Alcohol-interlock keyword. Link with koulu- ja päivähoitokuljetus, pakollinen varuste and kuljettaja on nauttinut alkoholia. It prevents driving when alcohol is detected.
School/day-care transport keyword. Link with koulukuljetus, päivähoitokuljetus, alkolukko, rikostaustaote and child safety duties.
Use this word in Koulu / päivähoito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Lapsi + turvavyö / safety questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Koulu / päivähoito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Lapsi + turvavyö / safety questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Koulu / päivähoito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Koulu / päivähoito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Vehicle keyword. Link with auto, istuinpaikkaluku, etuistuin, takapenkki, tavaratila, turvatyyny and vehicle equipment/safety.
Core safety trigger. In stopping, reversing, route, speed, or passenger-request questions, choose the option that protects liikenneturvallisuus and avoids vaarantaa muuta liikennettä.
Traffic keyword. Link with liikennemerkki, tienkäyttäjä, vaikutusalue, liikennekelpoisuus and legal road use.
Stopping keyword. Link with pysähtyminen, pysäyttää, pysähtymiskielto and turvallinen poistuminen. The safest legal stop is often the correct answer.
Driving-style keyword. Link with ennakoiva ajotapa, nopeus, ylinopeus, keli, pimeä aika and safe driving in conditions.
Use this word in Ajotapa / nopeus / turvaväli questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Luvat / työaika / viranomaiset questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

words.meaning_en: right side; on the right side
words.exam_use_en: Use this word in Yleinen taksinkuljettajan velvollisuus questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Liikennesäännöt / ajotapa questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Authority keyword. In traffic-control questions, follow the poliisi/viranomainen instruction. In drunk/aggressive passenger questions, call or contact police only when the situation cannot be managed safely.
Emergency keyword. Link with hätäkeskus, hätänumero, ensiapu, hengitystiet, kylkiasento and sairauskohtaus. In exam logic, secure the situation and call help when necessary.

Use this for drunk passenger situations: päihtynyt/humalainen asiakas, aggressiivinen käyttäytyminen, häiriö, rauhallisesti toimiminen. If the situation cannot be handled safely, the exam logic may lead to poliisi.

words.meaning_en: to be guilty of / commit an offence
words.exam_use_en: Use syyllistyä/syyllistynyt in legal responsibility or offence contexts.
Use this word in Hätätilanne / poliisi / ensiapu questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use nukahtaa/nukahtanut when a passenger has fallen asleep or cannot respond. It often connects with safety, waking the passenger, or asking for help if the situation cannot be handled.
Use this word in Hätätilanne / poliisi / ensiapu questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

forms_fi.en: to gross endangerment of traffic safety

words.exam_use_en: Use this word in Luvat / työaika / viranomaiset questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

forms_fi.en: a car that has driven off the road

words.exam_use_en: Use ulosajo/ulosajanut in accident or emergency contexts.
Receipt keyword. Link with kuitin tarjoaminen. In payment questions, remember that the customer must be offered a receipt when required.
Payment keyword. Link with maksukortti, käteinen, maksuväline, vaihtoraha and omavastuu.
Price/fare keyword. Link with hinta, veloittaa, edullinen, siivouslisämaksu and extra charges. Used when deciding what can be charged from the customer.

words.meaning_en: Kela / Finnish social insurance institution; Kela / Social Insurance Institution of Finland
words.exam_use_en: Use this word in Kela / vakiotaksi questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Maksu / kuitti / hinta questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Pyörätuoli / esteetön / special assistance questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

words.meaning_en: to revoke / cancel; to reverse / to cancel
words.exam_use_en: Use this word in Turvavyö / lapsi / turvalaite questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Destination keyword. Link with määränpää, osoite, sijainti, päästä perille and sisätila. Important with children, disabled passengers and safe drop-off.
Route keyword. Link with reitti, navigaattori, kartta, oikaista, ruuhka and customer’s chosen route versus safe/legal driving.
Use matka for taxi ride/trip questions. Related forms like matkaa and matkatavara appear with route, passenger journey, fare, luggage and assistance contexts.
Use this word in Maksu / kuitti / hinta questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Liikennesäännöt / ajotapa questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Näkövammainen / opaskoira questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Pyörätuoli / esteetön / special assistance questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use ensisijainen/ensisijaisesti when the question asks what should be done first or what is the preferred action. In exam logic it points to priority order.
Use this word in Lapsi + turvavyö / safety questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

words.meaning_en: to leave / to go / to start moving
words.exam_use_en: Use this word in Turvavyö / lapsi / turvalaite questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

forms_fi.en: practical judgement / ability to read the situation

words.exam_use_en: Pelisilmä means practical judgement: choosing the sensible action in a customer or traffic situation, not just following words mechanically.
Driver/operator keyword. Link with kuljettaja, taksinkuljettaja, vakiotaksi and tilausvälitysyhtiö.
Responsibility/legal-duty keyword. Link with vastuulla, velvollisuus, oikeus, määräys and vaatimus. Use it to decide who must do what.
Permit/licence keyword. Link with ajolupa, liikennelupa, voimassa, terveysvaatimus and suorittaminen. Used in legal right-to-drive/service questions.
Work-rule keyword. Link with työaika, tauko, työnantaja, työsuhde, irtisanomisaika and ajopäiväkirja.
Use this word in Maksu / kuitti / hinta questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Lapsi + turvavyö / safety questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Use this word in Liikennesäännöt / ajotapa questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.
Customer/passenger keyword. Link with asiakkaan pyyntö, asiakastilanne, matkustaja, and safe service. The customer can request many things, but safety and law still decide the best answer.
Service-quality keyword. Group palvelun taso, palvelutapa and palvelunumero here. It appears in customer service and complaint questions where the driver must behave professionally.
Professional-behaviour keyword. Link with asiallinen, asianmukainen, kohtelias, rauhallinen, keskustelu and tilannetaju.
Complaint/error keyword. Link with valitus, valittaa, virheellinen, ongelma and pahoitella. Used in customer complaint and correction situations.
Lost-property keyword. Link with käsilaukku, lompakko and löytötavaratoimisto. Used when belongings are left in the taxi.
Use this word in Koulu / päivähoito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

words.meaning_en: words that connect, add, or choose between ideas
words.exam_use_en: These words connect ideas. In exam questions, both connected parts may matter; do not ignore the second phrase after the connector.

words.meaning_en: words that explain the reason, content, or purpose

forms_fi.en: so that / in such a way that

words.exam_use_en: These words often explain why the correct action is required, especially in safety, responsibility, and legal-rule questions.

words.meaning_en: words that make the answer depend on a condition or exception
words.exam_use_en: These words tell you the rule applies only under a condition, exception, or special situation. They are strong exam clues.

words.meaning_en: words that show timing, order, duration, or urgency
words.exam_use_en: These words are useful in questions about safety, lost property, emergency actions, and sequence of actions.

words.meaning_en: words that change, limit, or strengthen the meaning
words.exam_use_en: These words can create traps because they reverse meaning, limit the rule, or make the statement too absolute.

words.meaning_en: words that ask for the correct thing, option, type, or meaning
words.exam_use_en: These words tell you the question asks for the correct option, action, thing, or type.

words.meaning_en: words that ask who is responsible, who has authority, or who is involved
words.exam_use_en: These are among the most important taxi-exam question words because many questions ask about responsibility.

words.meaning_en: words that ask place, direction, source, cause, or limit

forms_fi.en: to where / until what / for what

words.exam_use_en: These words help identify whether the question asks location, origin/cause, destination, or limit.

words.meaning_en: words that ask time or how long something lasts
words.exam_use_en: These words are useful for parking, permit validity, waiting time, and time-limit questions.

words.meaning_en: words that ask reason, method, amount, or way of acting
words.exam_use_en: These words show whether the question asks for a reason, a method/action, or a number/amount.
